items.title: Seedance 2.0 AI — Latest
items.description: ByteDance's flagship Seedance 2.0 AI video model. Supports multimodal input (text, image, video, audio), multi-shot storytelling, native audio with lip sync, reference-driven generation, and 4–15s flexible duration. Ideal for cinematic and professional AI video production.

items.title: Seedance 1.5 Pro
items.description: Enhanced text-to-video and image-to-video generation with improved motion consistency and visual quality. A great balance of speed and output quality for professional workflows.

items.title: Seedance 1.0 (Pro & Lite)
items.description: The original Seedance model with Pro and Lite variants. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video with fast processing and reliable output quality at an affordable price point.

faq.title: Seedance 2.0 AI FAQ — How to Use Seedance 2.0
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Seedance 2.0 AI video generation.

items.question: How to use Seedance 2.0 AI video generator?
items.answer: Using Seedance 2.0 AI is simple: sign up for a free account on AI Video Generator Free, select Seedance 2.0 from the model list, enter a text prompt or upload a reference image, choose your resolution and duration (4–15s), then click Generate. Your Seedance 2.0 AI video will be ready in seconds — no local GPU or installation required.

items.question: What is Seedance 2.0 AI by ByteDance?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 AI is ByteDance's flagship AI video generation model. It supports multimodal input (text, image, video, audio), multi-shot storytelling, native audio with lip sync, reference-driven generation, and flexible 4–15s duration — making it one of the most capable AI video models available.

items.question: What is the difference between Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 1.5 Pro?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 AI introduces multimodal input, multi-shot storytelling, native audio with lip sync, and flexible 4–15s duration. Seedance 1.5 Pro focuses on enhanced text/image-to-video with improved motion consistency but lacks multi-shot and reference video input.

items.question: What video resolution does Seedance 2.0 support?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 AI supports 480p and 720p output with 6 aspect ratio options: 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 1:1, and 21:9.

items.question: Can I use Seedance 2.0 for free?
items.answer: Yes — you can try Seedance 2.0 AI free online with sign-up credits. No credit card required to start generating AI videos.

items.question: Does Seedance 2.0 AI support audio generation?
items.answer: Yes. Seedance 2.0 AI supports native audio generation with lip sync and beat matching. You can upload reference audio to guide the video's audio output.

items.question: What is the maximum video length with Seedance 2.0?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 AI supports flexible duration from 4 to 15 seconds. Seedance 1.5 Pro and 1.0 typically generate 5–10 second videos.
